summary: Deploy a new BurnMint token cross-chain end to end: deploy the token and pool, register it, set the pool, and wire a lane. Run per chain, then send.

inputs.remoteChain: the remote chain selectorName to wire a lane to

steps.successCriteria: the token address is recorded in the project store (addresses.active.token)
the pool is recorded and its typeAndVersion is BurnMintTokenPool 2.0.0
the TokenAdminRegistry administrator for the token is the executing account
TokenAdminRegistry getPool(token) equals the deployed pool
the remote chain is supported on the pool with a remote pool and rate limits

modeNote: Under mode=safe the register, set-pool, and wire-lane steps emit one Safe batch to sign instead of broadcasting; the deploy steps sign with the keystore in both modes.
postWorkflow: Run this workflow on BOTH chains (swapping chain and remoteChain), then send a transfer with ccip-cli (see guides/send-track-diagnose.md).
